{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Seven Calamities battle requirement
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A battle against any of the [[Seven Calamities]] would require all five [[Divine Titans]] or one [[Zenith Device]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
